approvedrevs-desc: U deji nooc keli ah oo bog ah mid la ansixiyey
approvedrevs-logdesc: Kani waa diiwaanka dib u eegisyada la ansixiyey.
approvedrevs-approvesuccess: Noocan dib u eegista ee bogga waxaa loo dejiyey inuu noqdo nooca la ansixiyey.
approvedrevs-unapprovesuccess:
Boggan mar dambe ma laha nooc la ansixiyey.
Bedelkeeda, dib u eegista ugu dambeysay ayaa la muujin doonaa.
approvedrevs-unapprovesuccess2:
Boggan mar dambe ma laha nooc la ansixiyey.
Bedelkeeda, bog bannaan ayaa la muujin doonaa.
approvedrevs-approveaction: u deji $2 inuu noqdo dib u eegista la ansixiyey ee "[[$1]]"
approvedrevs-approvefileaction: u deji soo gelinta $2 inay noqoto dib u eegista la ansixiyey ee "[[$1]]"
approvedrevs-unapproveaction: ka saar dib u eegista la ansixiyey ee "[[$1]]"
approvedrevs-notlatest: Tani waa dib u eegista la ansixiyey ee boggan; ma aha tan ugu dambeysay.
approvedrevs-approvedandlatest: Tani waa dib u eegista la ansixiyey ee boggan, sidoo kalena waa tan ugu dambeysay.
approvedrevs-blankpageshown: Dib u eegis lama ansixin boggan.
approvedrevs-noapprovedrevision: Tani waa dib-u-eegista ugu dambeysay ee boggan; ma laha dib u eegis la ansixiyey.
approvedrevs-editwarning: '''Fadlan ogow''' inaad hadda wax ka beddelayso dib u eegista ugu dambeysay ee boggan, taas oo aan ahayn tan la ansixiyey ee sida caadiga ah la muujiyo ([$1 isbeddelka eeg]).
approvedrevs-editwarning-pending: Isbeddelladaada waxaa loo muujin doonaa akhristayaasha marka isticmaale la oggolaaday uu ansixiyo.
approvedrevs-approvedpages: Dhammaan bogagga leh dib u eegis la ansixiyey
approvedrevs-notlatestpages: Bogagga leh dib u eegis la ansixiyey oo aan ahayn tan ugu dambeysay
approvedrevs-invalidpages: Bogagga leh ansixin aan sax ahayn
approvedrevs-difffromlatest: farqiga ka yimid kan ugu dambeeyay
approvedrevs-viewlatestrev: Eeg dib u eegista ugu dambeysay.
action-approverevisions: U deji dib u eegis gaar ah oo bog wiki ah inuu noqdo mid la ansixiyey
right-approverevisions: U deji dib u eegis gaar ah oo bog wiki ah inuu noqdo dib-u-eegista la ansixiyey
action-viewlinktolatest: Eeg qoraalka sharraxaadda ee ku yaal sare ee bogagga leh dib u eegis la ansixiyey
right-viewlinktolatest: Eeg qoraalka sharaxaadda ee kore ee bogagga leh dib u eegis la ansixiyey
action-viewapprover: Eeg qoraalka muujinaya cidda ansixisay dib u eegista la ansixiyey ee hadda jirta
right-viewapprover: Eeg qoraalka muujinaya cidda ansixisay dib u eegista la ansixiyey ee hadda
grant-group-approvedrevs: Ku ansixi ama ka laabo ansixinta dib u eegisyada iyadoo la adeegsanayo kordhinta ApprovedRevs
grant-approvedrevs: Ku ansixi oo ka laabo ansixinta dib u eegisyada iyadoo la adeegsanayo kordhinta ApprovedRevs
approvedrevs-invalidfiles: Faylal leh ansixin aan sax ahayn
approvedrevs-approvedfiles: Dhammaan faylasha leh dib u eegis la ansixiyey
approvedrevs-notlatestfiles: Faylasha ay dib u eegista la ansixiyey aan ahayn tan ugu dambeysay
apihelp-approve-summary: Dib u eegis ku samee adigoo ansixinaya ama ka laabanaya ansixinta.
apihelp-approve-param-revid: Aqoonsiga dib u eegista la doonayo in la ansixiyo.
apihelp-approve-param-unapprove: Haddii la dejiyo, dib u eegista waa laga laaban doonaa ansixinta halkii la ansixin lahaa.
apihelp-approve-example-2: Ka laabo ansixinta dib u eegista 12345
apihelp-approvedrev-summary: Haddii ay jirto, soo hel aqoonsiga dib u eegista la ansixiyey ee bogga.
